questionHtml:
A car engine has a useful power output of 20 kW and an efficiency of 50 %. The engine consumes 1 × 10−5 m3 of fuel every second. What is the energy density of the fuel?


A.  2 MJ m−3

B.  4 MJ m−3

C.  2 GJ m−3

D.  4 GJ m−3

meta.title: A car engine has a useful power output of 20 kW and an efficiency of 50 %. The engine consumes 1 × 10−5 m3 of fuel every second. What is the energy density of the fuel? A. 2 MJ m−3
